description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Bazel that runs on push to master, on pull requests, and allows manual invocation. The workflow consists of three ubuntu-24.04 jobs: test with Bazel v5.3.0 in a matrix of hardware and parallelism optimizers, test with sanitizers in a matrix of sanitizer options, and test with tcmalloc. Each job checks out the repository, sets up Bazel, installs requirements, and runs C++ tests with specific configurations.
